name: docmost-wiki
description: Agent skills for driving a self-hosted Docmost wiki (AgentWiki). Docmost is a thin API: it stores, retrieves, and relays. The intelligence (summarize, classify, tag, dedup decisions, code understanding) lives in the calling agent. All routes are relative to <DOCMOST_BASE_URL>/api and authenticate with a personal API key.

auth.note: Create the key in Docmost: Settings > API keys. The same key also works for the MCP endpoint at <DOCMOST_BASE_URL>/mcp.

conventions.method: All endpoints are POST (Docmost convention), JSON body unless marked multipart.
conventions.responseEnvelope: Responses are wrapped as { data, success, status }; read the `data` field.
conventions.scoping: Every call is scoped by the key owner's permissions (CASL). Writes require space Edit rights.

skills.name: wiki.files.upload
skills.summary: Bulk-upload text files (.md/.html) into a space as pages; returns a background file task.

params.spaceId: string (uuid, required) - target space; caller needs Edit/Page
params.files: file x N (repeated parts). Send relative paths as filenames (e.g. guide/setup.md) to build a page tree.

skills.returns: file_task { id, status:'processing', ... }. Poll wiki.files.taskStatus until success.
skills.limits: <=200 files; .md/.html become pages, other files are attachment candidates.

skills.name: wiki.files.taskStatus
skills.summary: Poll an import/file task until it succeeds or fails.

skills.name: wiki.page.create
skills.summary: Create a single page (e.g. an agent-generated wiki page).
skills.returns: { id, slugId, title, spaceId, parentPageId, position, ... }

skills.name: wiki.page.get
skills.summary: Read a page's metadata and (optionally) content to reason over it.

params.includeContent: boolean (set true to get the body)

skills.name: wiki.page.update
skills.summary: Write a new version of a page (title/content). Content goes through the CRDT path; native history records the version.

skills.name: wiki.page.setSummary
skills.summary: Store an agent-generated summary on a page (pages.summary).

params.summary: string - the summary text the agent produced

skills.name: wiki.page.move
skills.summary: Reparent/reorder a page within its space (classification result).

params.position: string (5-12 chars, fractional index) - place among siblings

skills.note: To move across spaces use /pages/move-to-space { pageId, spaceId }.

skills.name: wiki.spaces.list
skills.summary: List the spaces the key owner can access (the folders to classify into).

skills.name: wiki.labels.list
skills.summary: List the workspace's existing labels (tag vocabulary) so the agent reuses names instead of inventing synonyms.

skills.name: wiki.page.addLabels
skills.summary: Tag a page. Native upsert-by-name: pass tag names, server creates missing labels and attaches them.

skills.name: wiki.page.labels
skills.summary: Read the labels currently on a page.

skills.name: wiki.search
skills.summary: Keyword search across pages the key owner can see.
skills.returns: ranked items [{ id, title, slugId, rank, highlight }]

skills.name: wiki.dedup.analyze
skills.summary: Compute normalized content hashes and return clusters of exact-duplicate pages with a keep-oldest recommendation. Read-only.
skills.returns: { scanned, duplicateClusters, clusters:[{ sha256, charLen, pages:[{pageId,title,slugId,spaceId}], recommendation:{keepPageId,dropPageIds} }] }

skills.name: wiki.dedup.resolve
skills.summary: Apply a dedup decision: soft-delete the duplicate pages (never hard-deleted; native history preserved).

params.dropPageIds: string[] (uuid, required, non-empty; must not include keepPageId)

skills.name: wiki.organize.open
skills.summary: Open an organize task so progress is trackable; returns a shareable status URL to hand to a human.

params.spaceId: string (optional, uuid) - requires Edit/Page when set
params.title: string (optional)
params.fileTaskId: string (optional) - link to the import task

skills.name: wiki.organize.status
skills.summary: Poll an organize task and its events.
skills.returns: { id, status, total, completed, statusUrl, events:[...] }

skills.name: wiki.organize.report
skills.summary: Report one step of progress. First event flips the task to running; countsAsProgress bumps completed. Docmost relays this to the live UI.
